JOSHUA ROSEN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT SAMEH SAMY FLANN FARAG VIA COURTCALL. CARLA BRAUNSTEIN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. & RASIER-CA, LLC VIA COURTCALL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 2/28/22 IS CONTINUED TO 7/25/22 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRETRIAL AND DISCOVERY DEADLINES SHALL TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL WILL BE SET AS A JURY TRIAL IF THE PARTY WILL POST JURY FEES BY 4:00PM TODAY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT AND MOVING PARTY TO SERVE THE ORDER. NOTICE WAIVED BY PARTIES. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
